summary: Audited workflow and business-evidence as the next low-risk candidate family and found a real workflow residual: PM and finance can read workflow actions while sc.workflow.* models remain unreadable to them. Business-evidence itself stays aligned with its read-only model semantics.

notes: The residual is on workflow action visibility versus model ACL ownership.
This is not a sample issue and cannot be classified away.
A narrow follow-up governance batch is required before workflow can be treated as a clean family.

next_step: Open a narrow follow-up batch to align workflow action visibility with actual sc.workflow.* model ownership.
